    • DELETE api/accounts/{id}
    • GET api/journal-entries
    • POST api/journal-entries
    • Post (lock) a journal entry — makes it permanently immutable.
    • Reverse a posted journal entry — creates a negating entry.
    • Queryable audit log — returns DB-persisted entries filtered by action/model/user/date.

    • GET api/reports/balance-sheet
    • POST api/reports/account-statement/{account_id}
    • Inventory valuation report — compares WAC, FIFO, and LIFO values side by side.
    • Permissions audit report — current permission matrix + recent changes + auth failures.
    • Tax compliance report: revenue and tax collected per category within a date range.
    • Monthly tax report: tax collected grouped by month for a given year.
    • Revenue monitoring: daily revenue + tax trend within a date range.

  • Licensing
    • Activate a license key for a device. First activation binds the device; subsequent calls from the same device re-confirm it.
    • Periodic online re-validation (e.g. every 24h) from an already activated device.
    • GET api/admin/licenses
    • POST api/admin/licenses
    • PATCH api/admin/licenses/{id}/revoke

  • Documentation powered by Scribe ✍
  • Last updated: June 29, 2026

Introduction

Base URL: http://localhost 
This documentation aims to provide all the information you need to work with our API.

<aside>As you scroll, you'll see code examples for working with the API in different programming languages in the dark area to the right (or as part of the content on mobile).
You can switch the language used with the tabs at the top right (or from the nav menu at the top left on mobile).</aside>

Authenticating requests

To authenticate requests, include an Authorization header with the value "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}".

All authenticated endpoints are marked with a requires authentication badge in the documentation below.

You can retrieve your token by visiting your dashboard and clicking Generate API token.

Authentication

Log in

Authenticate with tenant code, username and password; returns a Sanctum bearer token.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/login" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"tenant_code\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"username\": \"amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt\",
    \"password\": \"t(!Cs\'YAKYLk4>S\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/login"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "tenant_code": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "username": "amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt",
    "password": "t(!Cs'YAKYLk4>S"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/login

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

tenant_code   string     

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

username   string     

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

password   string     

Must not be greater than 200 characters. Example: t(!Cs'YAKYLk4>S

POST api/logout

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/logout" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/logout"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/logout

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Customers

GET api/customers/search

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost/api/customers/search" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/customers/search"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (401):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
vary: Origin

{
    "success": false,
    "message": "غير مصرح."
}

Request      

GET api/customers/search

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Quick-create a customer from the POS (name + phone only).

Accessible to view_pos users without full CRM permissions.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/customers/quick" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"phone\": \"amniihfqcoynlazgh\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/customers/quick"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "phone": "amniihfqcoynlazgh"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/customers/quick

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Must not be greater than 150 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

phone   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazgh

GET api/customers

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost/api/customers" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/customers"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

GET api/customers

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

POST api/customers

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/customers" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{

Request      

POST api/customers

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Must not be greater than 150 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

phone   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazgh

email   string  optional    

Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 150 characters. Example: roob.mona@example.org

type   string  optional    

Example: business

Must be one of:
  • individual
  • business
national_id   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 14 characters. Example: xbajwbpilpmu

tax_number   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: finllwloauydlsmsj

commercial_register   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 30 characters. Example: uryvojcybzvrbyickznky

governate   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: gloigmkwxphlvazjrcnfb

city   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: aqywuxhgjjmzuxjubqouz

address   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: swiwxtrkimfcatbxspzmr

credit_limit   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 9999999. Example: 1

notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: zsroyjpxmqesedyghenqc

customer_group_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

price_level   string  optional    

Example: retail

Must be one of:
  • retail
  • wholesale
  • vip
is_active   boolean  optional    

Example: true

POST api/register

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/register" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"store_name\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"store_code\": \"amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt\",
    \"full_name\": \"qxbajwbpilpmufinllwlo\",
    \"username\": \"auydlsmsjuryvojcybzvr\",
    \"password\": \"x?(F|S\",
    \"plan_id\": \"kygloigmkwxphlvazjrcn\",
    \"business_type\": \"general\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/register"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "store_name": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "store_code": "amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt",
    "full_name": "qxbajwbpilpmufinllwlo",
    "username": "auydlsmsjuryvojcybzvr",
    "password": "x?(F|S",
    "plan_id": "kygloigmkwxphlvazjrcn",
    "business_type": "general"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/register

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

store_name   string     

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

store_code   string     

Must contain only letters, numbers, dashes and underscores. Must not be greater than 30 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

full_name   string     

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: qxbajwbpilpmufinllwlo

username   string     

Must match the regex /^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$/. Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: auydlsmsjuryvojcybzvr

password   string     

Must be at least 8 characters. Example: x?(F|S

plan_id   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: kygloigmkwxphlvazjrcn

business_type   string  optional    

Example: general

Must be one of:
  • retail
  • restaurant
  • pharmacy
  • medical_supplies
  • contracting
  • general

}"

);

    "discount_percent": 8,
    "price_level": "vip",

};

}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST api/customer-groups

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

description   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: Dolores molestias ipsam sit.

discount_percent   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 100. Example: 8

price_level   string  optional    

Example: vip

Must be one of:
  • retail
  • wholesale
  • vip
is_active   boolean  optional    

Example: true

POST /api/offline/sync

Accepts a batch of offline-created invoices and syncs them idempotently. Each invoice must include an offline_uuid.

Request body: { "invoices": [ { offline_uuid, items, payment_method, ... } ] }

Response (merged to top level via ApiResponse): { success: true, synced: N, skipped: N, failed: N, results: [...] }

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/offline/sync" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"invoices\": [
        {
            \"offline_uuid\": \"66529e01-d113-3473-8d6f-9e11e09332ea\",
            \"items\": [
                {
                    \"product_id\": 17,
                    \"quantity\": 13,
                    \"price\": 16
                }
            ],
            \"payment_method\": \"card\",
            \"discount\": 5,
            \"cash_received\": 50,
            \"notes\": \"pfuudtdsufvyvddqamnii\"
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/offline/sync"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "invoices": [
        {
            "offline_uuid": "66529e01-d113-3473-8d6f-9e11e09332ea",
            "items": [
                {
                    "product_id": 17,
                    "quantity": 13,
                    "price": 16
                }
            ],
            "payment_method": "card",
            "discount": 5,
            "cash_received": 50,
            "notes": "pfuudtdsufvyvddqamnii"
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/offline/sync

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

invoices   object[]     

Must have at least 1 items. Must not have more than 20 items.
offline_uuid   string     

Must be a valid UUID. Example: 66529e01-d113-3473-8d6f-9e11e09332ea

items   object[]     

Must have at least 1 items. Must not have more than 100 items.
product_id   integer     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

quantity   integer     

Must be at least 1. Must not be greater than 9999. Example: 13

price   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 9999999. Example: 16

payment_method   string  optional    

Example: card

Must be one of:
  • cash
  • card
  • transfer
  • wallet
  • credit
discount   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 9999999. Example: 5

cash_received   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 50

customer_id   string  optional    

Must match an existing stored value.

notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: pfuudtdsufvyvddqamnii

    \"notes\": \"niihfqcoynlazghdtqtqx\",
    \"expires_in_minutes\": 2
}"

);

};

Must be at least 1. Must not be greater than 100. Example: 13

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

product_id   integer     

The ID of the product. Example: 1

POST api/products/{product_id}/recipe

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/products/1/recipe" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"ingredients\": [
        {
            \"quantity\": 73
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/products/1/recipe"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "ingredients": [
        {
            "quantity": 73
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

product_id   integer     

The ID of the product. Example: 1

Body Parameters

ingredients   object[]     
ingredient_id   string  optional    
quantity   number     

Must be at least 0.001. Example: 73

POST api/products/{product_id}/unit-conversion

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/products/1/unit-conversion" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"purchase_unit_id\": \"consequatur\",
    \"sale_unit_id\": \"consequatur\",
    \"conversion_factor\": 45
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/products/1/unit-conversion"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "purchase_unit_id": "consequatur",
    "sale_unit_id": "consequatur",
    "conversion_factor": 45
};

    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST api/products/{product_id}/unit-conversion

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

product_id   integer     

The ID of the product. Example: 1

Body Parameters

purchase_unit_id   string     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: consequatur

sale_unit_id   string     

The value and purchase_unit_id must be different. Must match an existing stored value. Example: consequatur

conversion_factor   number     

Must be at least 0.000001. Example: 45

Request      

GET api/purchase-orders

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

supplier_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

status   string  optional    

Example: rejected

Must be one of:
  • draft
  • pending
  • approved
  • partial
  • received
  • cancelled
  • rejected
search   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

per_page   integer  optional    

Must be at least 1. Must not be greater than 100. Example: 13

POST api/purchase-orders

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/purchase-orders" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"supplier_id\": 17,
    \"order_date\": \"2020-10-25\",
    \"expected_date\": \"2107-07-29\",
    \"discount\": 45,
    \"notes\": \"qeopfuudtdsufvyvddqam\",
    \"items\": [
        {
            \"product_id\": 17,
            \"product_name\": \"mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa\",
            \"quantity\": 13,
            \"cost_price\": 46,
            \"selling_price\": 28
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/purchase-orders"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "supplier_id": 17,
    "order_date": "2020-10-25",
    "expected_date": "2107-07-29",
    "discount": 45,
    "notes": "qeopfuudtdsufvyvddqam",
    "items": [
        {
            "product_id": 17,
            "product_name": "mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa",
            "quantity": 13,
            "cost_price": 46,
            "selling_price": 28
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/purchase-orders

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

supplier_id   integer     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

order_date   string     

Must be a valid date. Must be a date before or equal to today. Example: 2020-10-25

expected_date   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Must be a date after or equal to order_date. Example: 2107-07-29

discount   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 45

notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: qeopfuudtdsufvyvddqam

items   object[]     

Must have at least 1 items. Must not have more than 500 items.
product_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

product_name   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

quantity   integer     

Must be at least 1. Must not be greater than 99999. Example: 13

cost_price   number     

Must be at least 0. Example: 46

selling_price   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 28

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

supplier_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

date_from   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-29T21:35:32

date_to   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Must be a date after or equal to date_from. Example: 2107-07-29

per_page   integer  optional    

Must be at least 1. Must not be greater than 100. Example: 13

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

amount   number

Example: card

Must be one of:
  • cash

Must be a valid date. Must be a date before or equal to today. Example: 2020-10-25

notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "http://localhost/api/warehouses"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

name   string

address   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

keeper_name   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: qxbajwbpilpmufinllwlo

is_default   boolean  optional    

Example: false

is_active   boolean  optional    

Example: false

Request      

POST api/warehouse-transfers

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

from_warehouse_id   string     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: consequatur

to_warehouse_id   string     

The value and from_warehouse_id must be different. Must match an existing stored value. Example: consequatur

notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

items   object[]     

Must have at least 1 items.
product_id   string     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: consequatur

quantity   integer     

Must be at least 1. Example: 45

batch_id   string  optional    

Must match an existing stored value.

Request      

POST api/product-batches

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

product_id   string     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: consequatur

warehouse_id   string     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: consequatur

batch_number   string     

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

lot_number   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: mniihfqcoynlazghdtqtq

manufacture_date   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Must be a date before or equal to today. Example: 2020-10-25

expiry_date   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Must be a date after today. Example: 2107-07-29

original_qty   integer     

Must be at least 1. Example: 45

cost_price   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 56

supplier_id   string  optional    

Must match an existing stored value.

notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: eopfuudtdsufvyvddqamn

GET /api/stock/health

Comprehensive stock-health snapshot: low stock, out-of-stock, near-expiry, expired batches, and reorder suggestions — all in a single response. Cached at the HTTP layer; callers should add ?_bust=1 to bypass.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost/api/stock/health" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"warehouse_id\": 17
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/stock/health"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "warehouse_id": 17
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

warehouse_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

GET /api/stock/low-stock

Products at or below their configured min_stock (and min_stock > 0), ordered by quantity ascending so the most critical appear first.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost/api/stock/low-stock" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"warehouse_id\": 17
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/stock/low-stock"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "warehouse_id": 17
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

GET /api/stock/expired-batches

Batches whose expiry_date is in the past but that still carry remaining_qty. These should be written off via POST /stock/write-off-expired.

    --get "http://localhost/api/stock/expired-batches" \

GET /api/stock/reorder-suggestions?lookback_days=7

POST /api/stock/reserve

Reserve units for a pending order. Increments reserved_qty; the product is not deducted until fulfill() is called.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/stock/reserve" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"product_id\": 17,
    \"quantity\": 45,
    \"warehouse_id\": 17
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/stock/reserve"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "product_id": 17,
    "quantity": 45,
    "warehouse_id": 17
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

quantity   integer

POST /api/batches

Create a batch and add its qty to stock (routed through StockService).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/batches" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"batch_number\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"lot_number\": \"amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt\",
    \"manufacture_date\": \"2020-10-25\",
    \"expiry_date\": \"2107-07-29\",
    \"original_qty\": 45,
    \"cost_price\": 56,
    \"notes\": \"eopfuudtdsufvyvddqamn\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/batches"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "batch_number": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "lot_number": "amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt",
    "manufacture_date": "2020-10-25",
    "expiry_date": "2107-07-29",
    "original_qty": 45,
    "cost_price": 56,
    "notes": "eopfuudtdsufvyvddqamn"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/batches

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

product_id   string  optional    
warehouse_id   string  optional    
batch_number   string     

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

lot_number   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

manufacture_date   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Must be a date before or equal to today. Example: 2020-10-25

expiry_date   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Must be a date after today. Example: 2107-07-29

original_qty   integer     

Must be at least 1. Example: 45

cost_price   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 56

supplier_id   string  optional    
notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: eopfuudtdsufvyvddqamn

PUT /api/batches/{batch}/adjust

Correct the remaining_qty on a batch. The diff is applied as a stock adjustment movement so the ledger stays in sync.

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://localhost/api/batches/17/adjust" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"new_quantity\": 73,
    \"reason\": \"mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/batches/17/adjust"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "new_quantity": 73,
    "reason": "mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

POST /api/batches/{batch}/write-off

Write off a single batch (damaged, expired, etc.).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/batches/17/write-off" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"reason\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/batches/17/write-off"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "reason": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

POST /api/stock/write-off-expired

Bulk write-off of all expired batches. Each batch deduction is routed through StockService so a movement is logged and cost layers are consumed.

Requires manage_roles because this is a destructive financial operation.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/stock/write-off-expired" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"warehouse_id\": 17,
    \"reason\": \"mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/stock/write-off-expired"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "warehouse_id": 17,
    "reason": "mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

Recompute every account balance from posted journal-entry lines.

Destructive admin action: zeroes all balances then rebuilds from the ledger. Requires manage_roles permission (same guard as fiscal-period closing).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/accounts/recalculate-balances" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST api/accounts

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

account_code   string     

Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvy

account_name   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: vddqamniihfqcoynlazgh

account_type   string     

Example: revenue

Must be one of:
  • asset
  • liability
  • equity
  • revenue
  • expense
parent_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

description   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: Dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.

GET api/journal-entries

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

start_date   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-29T21:35:32

Must be a valid date. Must be a date after or equal to start_date. Example: 2107-07-29

POST api/journal-entries

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/journal-entries" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"entry_date\": \"2020-10-25\",
    \"description\": \"Dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.\",
    \"reference_type\": \"dtdsufvyvddqamniihfqc\",
    \"reference_id\": 51,
    \"lines\": [
        {
            \"account_id\": 17,
            \"debit\": 45,
            \"credit\": 56,
            \"description\": \"Iste laborum eius est dolor.\"
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/journal-entries"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "entry_date": "2020-10-25",
    "description": "Dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.",
    "reference_type": "dtdsufvyvddqamniihfqc",
    "reference_id": 51,
    "lines": [
        {
            "account_id": 17,
            "debit": 45,
            "credit": 56,
            "description": "Iste laborum eius est dolor."
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST api/journal-entries

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

entry_date   string     

Must be a valid date. Must be a date before or equal to today. Example: 2020-10-25

description   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: Dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.

reference_type   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: dtdsufvyvddqamniihfqc

reference_id   integer  optional    

Must be at least 1. Example: 51

lines   object[]     

Must have at least 2 items.
account_id   integer     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

debit   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 45

credit   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 56

description   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: Iste laborum eius est dolor.

Post (lock) a journal entry — makes it permanently immutable.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/journal-entries/17/post" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/journal-entries/17/post"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",

Reverse a posted journal entry — creates a negating entry.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/journal-entries/17/reverse" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"description\": \"Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/journal-entries/17/reverse"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "description": "Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor."
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/journal-entries/{entry_id}/reverse

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

entry_id   integer     

The ID of the entry. Example: 17

Body Parameters

description   string     

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: Dolores dolorum amet iste laborum eius est dolor.

Queryable audit log — returns DB-persisted entries filtered by action/model/user/date.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost/api/audit-logs" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"action\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"model\": \"amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt\",
    \"user_id\": 17,
    \"start_date\": \"2026-06-29T21:35:32\",
    \"end_date\": \"2107-07-29\",
    \"per_page\": 13
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/audit-logs"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "action": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "model": "amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt",
    "user_id": 17,
    "start_date": "2026-06-29T21:35:32",
    "end_date": "2107-07-29",
    "per_page": 13
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

GET api/audit-logs

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

action   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

model   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 150 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

user_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

start_date   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-29T21:35:32

end_date   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Must be a date after or equal to start_date. Example: 2107-07-29

per_page   integer  optional    

Must be at least 10. Must not be greater than 200. Example: 13

POST api/settings

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/settings" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"settings\": [
        {
            \"key\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
            \"value\": \"amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt\"
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/settings"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "settings": [
        {
            "key": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
            "value": "amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt"
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.

Request      

POST api/settings

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

settings   object[]     

Must not have more than 100 items.
key   string     

Must match an existing stored value. Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

value   string  optional    

Values must not be nested arrays; strings and numerics are fine. SettingService::updateBatch() additionally runs strip_tags() and an allowlist check. Must not be greater than 2048 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

);

};

    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

POST api/reports/tax

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Monthly tax report: tax collected grouped by month for a given year.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost/api/reports/tax/monthly" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"year\": 21
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/reports/tax/monthly"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "year": 21
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

GET api/reports/tax/monthly

Headers

year   integer

Revenue monitoring: daily revenue + tax trend within a date range.

Useful for charts showing gross revenue vs tax collected over time.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/reports/revenue-monitoring" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"start_date\": \"2026-06-29T21:35:32\",
    \"end_date\": \"2107-07-29\",
    \"group_by\": \"month\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/reports/revenue-monitoring"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "start_date": "2026-06-29T21:35:32",
    "end_date": "2107-07-29",
    "group_by": "month"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST api/reports/revenue-monitoring

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

start_date   string     

Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-29T21:35:32

end_date   string     

Must be a valid date. Must be a date after or equal to start_date. Example: 2107-07-29

group_by   string  optional    

Example: month

Must be one of:
  • day
  • week
  • month

Request      

POST api/reports/inventory-movements

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

start_date   string     

Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-29T21:35:32

end_date   string     

Must be a valid date. Must be a date after or equal to start_date. Example: 2107-07-29

product_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

warehouse_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

movement_type   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

search   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: mniihfqcoynlazghdtqtq

per_page   integer  optional    

Must be at least 10. Must not be greater than 200. Example: 23

POST api/reports/profitable-products

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/reports/profitable-products" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"start_date\": \"2026-06-29T21:35:33\",
    \"end_date\": \"2107-07-29\",
    \"limit\": 13
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/reports/profitable-products"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "start_date": "2026-06-29T21:35:33",
    "end_date": "2107-07-29",
    "limit": 13
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

POST api/budgets

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/budgets" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"entries\": [
        {
            \"year\": 21,
            \"month\": 6,
            \"type\": \"revenue\",
            \"category\": \"qeopfuudtdsufvyvddqam\",
            \"amount\": 46,
            \"notes\": \"iihfqcoynlazghdtqtqxb\"
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/budgets"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

        {

            "month": 6,
            "type": "revenue",
            "category": "qeopfuudtdsufvyvddqam",
            "amount": 46,
            "notes": "iihfqcoynlazghdtqtqxb"
        }
    ]
};

    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST api/budgets

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

entries   object[]     

Must have at least 1 items.
year   integer     

Must be at least 2000. Must not be greater than 2100. Example: 21

month   integer     

Must be at least 1. Must not be greater than 12. Example: 6

type   string     

Example: revenue

Must be one of:
  • revenue
  • expense
category   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 150 characters. Example: qeopfuudtdsufvyvddqam

amount   number     

Must be at least 0. Example: 46

notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: iihfqcoynlazghdtqtqxb

POST api/promotions

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/promotions" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"description\": \"Dolores molestias ipsam sit.\",
    \"type\": \"buy_x_get_y\",
    \"value\": 25,
    \"buy_qty\": 19,
    \"get_qty\": 57,
    \"product_id\": 17,
    \"product_category\": \"mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa\",
    \"min_order_amount\": 45,
    \"starts_at\": \"2026-06-29T21:35:33\",
    \"ends_at\": \"2107-07-29\",
    \"is_active\": true
}"

    "http://localhost/api/promotions"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

    "description": "Dolores molestias ipsam sit.",
    "type": "buy_x_get_y",
    "value": 25,
    "buy_qty": 19,
    "get_qty": 57,

Request      

POST api/promotions

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Must not be greater than 150 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

description   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: Dolores molestias ipsam sit.

type   string     

Example: buy_x_get_y

Must be one of:
  • percentage
  • fixed
  • buy_x_get_y
value   number  optional    

This field is required unless type is in buy_x_get_y. Must be at least 0. Example: 25

buy_qty   integer  optional    

This field is required when type is buy_x_get_y. Must be at least 1. Example: 19

get_qty   integer  optional    

This field is required when type is buy_x_get_y. Must be at least 1. Example: 57

product_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

product_category   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

min_order_amount   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 45

starts_at   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-29T21:35:33

ends_at   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Must be a date after or equal to starts_at. Example: 2107-07-29

is_active   boolean  optional    

Example: true

PUT api/promotions/{id}

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://localhost/api/promotions/17" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"description\": \"Dolores molestias ipsam sit.\",
    \"type\": \"buy_x_get_y\",
    \"value\": 25,
    \"buy_qty\": 19,
    \"get_qty\": 57,
    \"product_id\": 17,
    \"product_category\": \"mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa\",
    \"min_order_amount\": 45,
    \"starts_at\": \"2026-06-29T21:35:33\",
    \"ends_at\": \"2107-07-29\",
    \"is_active\": false
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/promotions/17"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "description": "Dolores molestias ipsam sit.",
    "type": "buy_x_get_y",
    "value": 25,
    "buy_qty": 19,
    "get_qty": 57,
    "product_id": 17,
    "product_category": "mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa",
    "min_order_amount": 45,
    "starts_at": "2026-06-29T21:35:33",
    "ends_at": "2107-07-29",
    "is_active": false
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

Return backup health data for the admin dashboard.

Reads the spatie/laravel-backup BackupDestination directly so the endpoint works without running backup:monitor separately — useful for a live status panel that polls on-demand.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost/api/backup/status" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/backup/status"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

GET api/backup/status

Aggregated fraud signals for the admin dashboard.

Sources:

  • audit_logs (action LIKE 'anomaly.%') — real-time middleware signals
  • invoices created in off-hours — analytical signal
  • sales_returns grouped by cashier — excessive-return analytical signal
  • audit_logs (auth.login_failed) — brute-force signal
Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost/api/fraud/signals" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"hours\": 21
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/fraud/signals"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "hours": 21
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

POST /api/printing/print Print any document type by routing to the appropriate method.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/printing/print" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"document_type\": \"barcode\",
    \"document_id\": 73,
    \"printer_id\": 17,
    \"copies\": 5,
    \"quantity\": 16
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/printing/print"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "document_type": "barcode",
    "document_id": 73,
    "printer_id": 17,
    "copies": 5,
    "quantity": 16
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/printing/print

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

document_type   string     

Example: barcode

Must be one of:
  • invoice
  • return
  • shift_report
  • barcode
document_id   integer     

Must be at least 1. Example: 73

printer_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

copies   integer  optional    

Must be at least 1. Must not be greater than 10. Example: 5

quantity   integer  optional    

Must be at least 1. Must not be greater than 100. Example: 16

Request      

POST api/printing/printers

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

branch_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

connection_type   string     

Example: network

Must be one of:
  • usb
  • network
  • windows
ip_address   string  optional    

This field is required when connection_type is network. Must be a valid IP address. Example: 64.52.10.134

port   integer  optional    

Must be at least 1. Must not be greater than 65535. Example: 16

usb_device   string  optional    

This field is required when connection_type is usb. Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: eopfuudtdsufvyvddqamn

windows_printer_name   string  optional    

This field is required when connection_type is windows. Must not be greater than 200 characters. Example: iihfqcoynlazghdtqtqxb

paper_width   string     

Example: 58

Must be one of:
  • 58
  • 80
character_set   string     

Example: UTF-8

Must be one of:
  • CP437
  • CP720
  • UTF-8
auto_cut   boolean  optional    

Example: true

auto_open_drawer   boolean  optional    

Example: true

copies   integer  optional    

Must be at least 1. Must not be greater than 10. Example: 1

is_active   boolean  optional    

Example: false

is_default   boolean  optional    

Example: true

notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: jwbpilpmufinllwloauyd

PUT /api/printing/printers/{printer}

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://localhost/api/printing/printers/17" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"branch_id\": 17,
    \"connection_type\": \"network\",
    \"ip_address\": \"64.52.10.134\",
    \"port\": 16,
    \"usb_device\": \"eopfuudtdsufvyvddqamn\",
    \"windows_printer_name\": \"iihfqcoynlazghdtqtqxb\",
    \"paper_width\": 80,
    \"character_set\": \"UTF-8\",
    \"auto_cut\": true,
    \"auto_open_drawer\": true,
    \"copies\": 1,
    \"is_active\": false,
    \"is_default\": true,
    \"notes\": \"jwbpilpmufinllwloauyd\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/printing/printers/17"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "branch_id": 17,
    "connection_type": "network",
    "ip_address": "64.52.10.134",
    "port": 16,
    "usb_device": "eopfuudtdsufvyvddqamn",
    "windows_printer_name": "iihfqcoynlazghdtqtqxb",
    "paper_width": 80,
    "character_set": "UTF-8",
    "auto_cut": true,
    "auto_open_drawer": true,
    "copies": 1,
    "is_active": false,
    "is_default": true,
    "notes": "jwbpilpmufinllwloauyd"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

GET api/whatsapp/logs

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

phone   string  optional    

Must match the regex /^[+0-9\s-]+$/. Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvy

per_page   integer  optional    

Must be at least 1. Must not be greater than 100. Example: 21

status   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: ddqamniihfqcoynlazghd

type   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: tqtqxbajwbpilpmufinll

username   string

full_name   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

password   string     

Example: consequatur

role   string     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: consequatur

is_active   boolean  optional    

Example: true

Request      

POST api/admin/tenants

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

code   string     

Must contain only letters, numbers, dashes and underscores. Must not be greater than 30 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

plan   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: qxbajwbpilpmufinllwlo

trial_days   integer  optional    

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 365. Example: 1

PUT api/admin/tenants/{id}

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://localhost/api/admin/tenants/consequatur" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"plan\": \"amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/admin/tenants/consequatur"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "plan": "amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/admin/tenants/{id}/users

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   string     

The ID of the tenant. Example: consequatur

Body Parameters

full_name   string     

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

username   string     

Must contain only letters, numbers, dashes and underscores. Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

password   string     

Must be at least 6 characters. Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: t(!Cs'YAKYLk4>S

role   string     

Example: warehouse

Must be one of:
  • admin
  • cashier
  • warehouse

Request      

POST api/admin/plans

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

id   string     

Must contain only letters, numbers, dashes and underscores. Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

name   string     

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

monthly_price   number     

Must be at least 0. Example: 56

annual_price   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 80

trial_days   integer     

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 365. Example: 2

max_users   integer  optional    

Must be at least 1. Example: 1

max_products   integer  optional    

Must be at least 1. Example: 34

features   string[]  optional    

Must not be greater than 200 characters.

feature_flags   string[]  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters.

sort_order   integer     

Must be at least 0. Example: 88

    "http://localhost/api/admin/payment-accounts/1" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \

Headers

Content-Type

Accept

account_name   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: qxbajwbpilpmufinllwlo

is_active   boolean  optional    

Example: true

POST api/stock/reconcile

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

items   object[]

product_id   integer     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

physical_count   integer     

Must be at least 0. Example: 45

reason   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: qeopfuudtdsufvyvddqam

auto_adjust   boolean  optional    

Example: true

Request      

POST api/waste

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

product_id   integer     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

warehouse_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

batch_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

quantity   number     

Must be at least 0.001. Must not be greater than 999999. Example: 13

reason   string     

Example: other

Must be one of:
  • expired
  • damaged
  • theft
  • other
notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: qeopfuudtdsufvyvddqam

Request      

POST api/reports/profit-by-product

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

start_date   string     

Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-29T21:35:33

end_date   string     

Must be a valid date. Must be a date after or equal to start_date. Example: 2107-07-29

category   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

Create a manual kitchen order.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/kitchen" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"table_number\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvy\",
    \"order_type\": \"takeaway\",
    \"notes\": \"vddqamniihfqcoynlazgh\",
    \"items\": [
        {
            \"product_name\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
            \"product_id\": 17,
            \"quantity\": 45,
            \"unit\": \"qeopfuudtdsufvyvddqam\",
            \"notes\": \"niihfqcoynlazghdtqtqx\"
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/kitchen"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "table_number": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvy",
    "order_type": "takeaway",
    "notes": "vddqamniihfqcoynlazgh",
    "items": [
        {
            "product_name": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
            "product_id": 17,
            "quantity": 45,
            "unit": "qeopfuudtdsufvyvddqam",
            "notes": "niihfqcoynlazghdtqtqx"
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/kitchen

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

table_number   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvy

order_type   string     

Example: takeaway

Must be one of:
  • dine_in
  • takeaway
  • delivery
  • qr
notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: vddqamniihfqcoynlazgh

items   object[]     

Must have at least 1 items.
product_name   string     

Must not be greater than 200 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

product_id   integer  optional    

Example: 17

quantity   number     

Must be at least 0.01. Example: 45

unit   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: qeopfuudtdsufvyvddqam

notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 300 characters. Example: niihfqcoynlazghdtqtqx

Request      

POST api/qr/{token}/order

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

token   string     

Example: consequatur

Body Parameters

customer_name   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

customer_phone   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 30 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: qxbajwbpilpmufinllwlo

items   object[]     

Must have at least 1 items.
product_id   integer     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

quantity   number     

Must be at least 0.5. Example: 45

notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 200 characters. Example: qeopfuudtdsufvyvddqam

Evaluate pricing for one or more products (used by POS).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/pricing-rules/evaluate" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"items\": [
        {
            \"product_id\": 17,
            \"quantity\": 45
        }
    ],
    \"customer_group_id\": 17
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/pricing-rules/evaluate"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "items": [
        {
            "product_id": 17,
            "quantity": 45
        }
    ],
    "customer_group_id": 17
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

items   object[]     
product_id   integer     

Example: 17

quantity   number  optional

customer_group_id   integer  optional    

Example: 17

Redeem cashback for a customer.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/cashback/redeem" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \

    \"customer_id\": 17,
    \"amount\": 45,
    \"invoice_id\": 17
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/cashback/redeem"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "customer_id": 17,
    "amount": 45,
    "invoice_id": 17
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST api/cashback/redeem

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

customer_id   integer     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

amount   number     

Must be at least 0.01. Example: 45

invoice_id   integer  optional    

Example: 17

Cashback transaction history.

When customer_id is omitted returns recent global transactions (for admin view).

}"

};

Request      

POST api/cashback/rules

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

percentage   number     

Must be at least 0.01. Must not be greater than 100. Example: 1

min_purchase   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 45

max_cashback   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 46

POST api/crm/activities

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/crm/activities" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \

    \"type\": \"meeting\",
    \"subject\": \"mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa\",
    \"notes\": \"mniihfqcoynlazghdtqtq\",
    \"outcome\": \"negative\",
    \"scheduled_at\": \"2026-06-29T21:35:34\"
}"

    "http://localhost/api/crm/activities"
);

    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

    "subject": "mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa",
    "notes": "mniihfqcoynlazghdtqtq",
    "outcome": "negative",
    "scheduled_at": "2026-06-29T21:35:34"
};

}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST api/crm/activities

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

customer_id   integer     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

type   string     

Example: meeting

Must be one of:
  • call
  • email
  • visit
  • meeting
  • whatsapp
  • note
  • complaint
  • task
  • follow_up
  • sale
  • return
  • other
subject   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 200 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 2000 characters. Example: mniihfqcoynlazghdtqtq

outcome   string  optional    

Example: negative

Must be one of:
  • positive
  • neutral
  • negative
  • pending
scheduled_at   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-29T21:35:34

Request      

POST api/hr/employees

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

email   string  optional    

Must be a valid email address. Example: kunde.eloisa@example.com

phone   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 30 characters. Example: hfqcoynlazghdtqtqxbaj

position   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: wbpilpmufinllwloauydl

department   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: smsjuryvojcybzvrbyick

salary   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 88

status   string  optional    

Example: active

Must be one of:
  • active
  • inactive
  • terminated
hire_date   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-29T21:35:34

Example: application/json

Schedule a follow-up (stored as a pending CrmActivity).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/crm/follow-ups" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"customer_id\": 17,
    \"due_date\": \"2026-06-29T21:35:34\",
    \"notes\": \"mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa\",
    \"activity_type\": \"email\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/crm/follow-ups"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "customer_id": 17,
    "due_date": "2026-06-29T21:35:34",
    "notes": "mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa",
    "activity_type": "email"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/crm/follow-ups

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

customer_id   integer     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

due_date   string     

Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-29T21:35:34

notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 5000 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

activity_type   string  optional    

Example: email

Must be one of:
  • call
  • email
  • meeting
  • note
  • task
  • other

POST /api/stock/adjustment

Simple single-product stock quantity adjustment.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/stock/adjustment" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{

    \"quantity\": 17,
    \"reason\": \"mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa\",
    \"notes\": \"mniihfqcoynlazghdtqtq\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/stock/adjustment"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "product_id": 17,
    "quantity": 17,
    "reason": "mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa",
    "notes": "mniihfqcoynlazghdtqtq"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

product_id   integer     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

quantity   integer     

Example: 17

reason   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: mniihfqcoynlazghdtqtq

POST api/pharmacy/medicines

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/pharmacy/medicines" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name_ar\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"name_en\": \"amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt\",
    \"generic_name\": \"qxbajwbpilpmufinllwlo\",
    \"category\": \"analgesic\",
    \"dosage_form\": \"capsule\",
    \"strength\": \"auydlsmsjuryvojcybzvr\",
    \"unit\": \"byickznkygloigmkwxphl\",
    \"barcode\": \"consequatur\",
    \"manufacturer\": \"mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa\",
    \"requires_prescription\": false,
    \"controlled_drug\": true,
    \"reorder_level\": 45,
    \"selling_price\": 46,
    \"cost_price\": 28,
    \"notes\": \"ihfqcoynlazghdtqtqxba\",
    \"is_active\": true
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/pharmacy/medicines"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name_ar": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "name_en": "amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt",
    "generic_name": "qxbajwbpilpmufinllwlo",
    "category": "analgesic",
    "dosage_form": "capsule",
    "strength": "auydlsmsjuryvojcybzvr",
    "unit": "byickznkygloigmkwxphl",
    "barcode": "consequatur",
    "manufacturer": "mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa",
    "requires_prescription": false,
    "controlled_drug": true,
    "reorder_level": 45,
    "selling_price": 46,
    "cost_price": 28,
    "notes": "ihfqcoynlazghdtqtqxba",

};

Request      

POST api/pharmacy/medicines

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name_ar   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

name_en   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

generic_name   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: qxbajwbpilpmufinllwlo

category   string  optional    

Example: analgesic

Must be one of:
  • antibiotic
  • analgesic
  • antihypertensive
  • diabetes
  • vitamin
  • other
dosage_form   string  optional    

Example: capsule

Must be one of:
  • tablet
  • capsule
  • syrup
  • injection
  • cream
  • drops
  • other
strength   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: auydlsmsjuryvojcybzvr

unit   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: byickznkygloigmkwxphl

barcode   string  optional    

Example: consequatur

manufacturer   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

requires_prescription   boolean  optional    

Example: false

controlled_drug   boolean  optional    

Example: true

reorder_level   integer  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 45

selling_price   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 46

cost_price   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 28

notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: ihfqcoynlazghdtqtqxba

is_active   boolean  optional    

Example: true

PUT api/pharmacy/medicines/{id}

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://localhost/api/pharmacy/medicines/consequatur" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name_ar\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"name_en\": \"amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt\",
    \"generic_name\": \"qxbajwbpilpmufinllwlo\",
    \"category\": \"antihypertensive\",
    \"dosage_form\": \"capsule\",
    \"strength\": \"auydlsmsjuryvojcybzvr\",

Body Parameters

name_ar   string  optional

name_en   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

generic_name   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: qxbajwbpilpmufinllwlo

category   string  optional    

Example: antihypertensive

Must be one of:
  • antibiotic
  • analgesic
  • antihypertensive
  • diabetes
  • vitamin
  • other
dosage_form   string  optional    

Example: capsule

Must be one of:
  • tablet
  • capsule
  • syrup
  • injection
  • cream
  • drops
  • other
strength   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: auydlsmsjuryvojcybzvr

unit   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: byickznkygloigmkwxphl

barcode   string  optional    
manufacturer   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: vazjrcnfbaqywuxhgjjmz

requires_prescription   boolean  optional    

Example: false

controlled_drug   boolean  optional    

Example: true

reorder_level   integer  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 72

selling_price   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 82

cost_price   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 34

notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: ubqouzswiwxtrkimfcatb

is_active   boolean  optional    

Example: true

    \"quantity\": 45,
    \"expiry_date\": \"2107-07-29\",
    \"purchase_price\": 45,
    \"supplier_id\": 17,
    \"received_at\": \"2026-06-29T21:35:34\",
    \"notes\": \"mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa\"
}"

    "http://localhost/api/pharmacy/batches"
);

};

    "purchase_price": 45,
    "supplier_id": 17,

    "notes": "mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa"
};

    headers,

}).then(response => response.json());

Headers

Accept        

Example: application/json

medicine_id   string

quantity   integer     

Must be at least 1. Example: 45

expiry_date   string     

Must be a valid date. Must be a date after today. Example: 2107-07-29

purchase_price   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 45

supplier_id   integer  optional    

Example: 17

received_at   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-29T21:35:34

notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa
