Request      

POST api/pharmacy/prescriptions

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

patient_name   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

patient_phone   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 30 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

doctor_name   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: qxbajwbpilpmufinllwlo

doctor_phone   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 30 characters. Example: auydlsmsjuryvojcybzvr

clinic_name   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: byickznkygloigmkwxphl

issued_date   string     

Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-29T21:35:34

expiry_date   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Must be a date after issued_date. Example: 2107-07-29

notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

items   object[]     

Must have at least 1 items.
medicine_id   string     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: consequatur

quantity_prescribed   integer     

Must be at least 1. Example: 45

dosage_instructions   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: qeopfuudtdsufvyvddqam

    "http://localhost/api/shifts/break/start" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"type\": \"personal\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/shifts/break/start"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "type": "personal"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST api/white-label

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

app_name   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

primary_color   string  optional    

Must match the regex /^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$/. Example: #4CD4ab

secondary_color   string  optional    

Must match the regex /^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$/. Example: #4CD4ab

accent_color   string  optional    

Must match the regex /^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$/. Example: #4CD4ab

text_color   string  optional    

Must match the regex /^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$/. Example: #4CD4ab

bg_color   string  optional    

Must match the regex /^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$/. Example: #4CD4ab

font_family   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: dtdsufvyvddqamniihfqc

hide_powered_by   boolean  optional    

Example: true

custom_css   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 10000 characters. Example: oynlazghdtqtqxbajwbpi

footer_text   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: lpmufinllwloauydlsmsj

support_email   string  optional    

Must be a valid email address. Example: ypagac@example.net

support_phone   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 30 characters. Example: ojcybzvrbyickznkygloi

website_url   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. Example: http://www.kulas.com/repudiandae-est-nostrum-et-voluptas-consequatur-delectus-autem

support_website   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. Example: http://borer.com/et-perferendis-fuga-a-debitis

POST /api/kiosk/checkout — create a kiosk invoice

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/kiosk/checkout" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"items\": [
        {
            \"product_id\": 17,
            \"quantity\": 13
        }
    ],
    \"payment_method\": \"cash\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/kiosk/checkout"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "items": [
        {
            "product_id": 17,
            "quantity": 13
        }
    ],
    "payment_method": "cash"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/kiosk/checkout

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

items   object[]     

Must have at least 1 items. Must not have more than 50 items.
product_id   integer     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

quantity   number     

Must be at least 1. Must not be greater than 999. Example: 13

payment_method   string     

Example: cash

Must be one of:
  • cash
  • card

Headers

Content-Type

PATCH /api/v1/staff/kitchen/orders/{id}/status

Example request:
curl --request PATCH \
    "http://localhost/api/v1/staff/kitchen/orders/consequatur/status" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"status\": \"completed\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/v1/staff/kitchen/orders/consequatur/status"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "status": "completed"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PATCH",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

PATCH api/v1/staff/kitchen/orders/{id}/status

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   string     

The ID of the order. Example: consequatur

Body Parameters

status   string     

Example: completed

Must be one of:
  • in_progress
  • ready
  • completed

POST /api/v1/staff/pos/sale

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/v1/staff/pos/sale" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"items\": [
        {
            \"product_id\": \"consequatur\",
            \"quantity\": 45
        }
    ],
    \"payment_method\": \"card\",
    \"discount\": 73
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/v1/staff/pos/sale"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "items": [
        {
            "product_id": "consequatur",
            "quantity": 45
        }
    ],
    "payment_method": "card",
    "discount": 73
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request failed with error:

Request      

POST api/v1/staff/pos/sale

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

items   object[]     

Must have at least 1 items.
product_id   string     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: consequatur

quantity   number     

Must be at least 0.001. Example: 45

payment_method   string     

Example: card

Must be one of:
  • cash
  • card
  • transfer
customer_id   string  optional    

Must match an existing stored value.

discount   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 73

POST /api/v1/customer/qr-order

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/v1/customer/qr-order" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"items\": [
        {
            \"product_id\": \"consequatur\",
            \"quantity\": 45
        }
    ],
    \"notes\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/v1/customer/qr-order"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

            "quantity": 45

};

}).then(response => response.json());

POST api/invoices

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/invoices" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"items\": [
        {
            \"product_id\": 17,
            \"quantity\": 13
        }
    ],
    \"discount\": 73,
    \"payment_method\": \"card\",
    \"cash_received\": 45,
    \"notes\": \"qeopfuudtdsufvyvddqam\",
    \"redeem_loyalty_points\": 46,
    \"offline_uuid\": \"77d66ab0-ed8e-31b6-bb6b-acfbf3e0d8a0\",
    \"payments\": [
        {
            \"method\": \"cash\",
            \"amount\": 56,
            \"reference\": \"eopfuudtdsufvyvddqamn\"
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/invoices"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "items": [
        {
            "product_id": 17,
            "quantity": 13
        }
    ],
    "discount": 73,
    "payment_method": "card",
    "cash_received": 45,
    "notes": "qeopfuudtdsufvyvddqam",
    "redeem_loyalty_points": 46,
    "offline_uuid": "77d66ab0-ed8e-31b6-bb6b-acfbf3e0d8a0",
    "payments": [
        {
            "method": "cash",
            "amount": 56,
            "reference": "eopfuudtdsufvyvddqamn"
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/invoices

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

items   object[]     

Must have at least 1 items. Must not have more than 200 items.
product_id   integer     

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

quantity   integer     

Must be at least 1. Must not be greater than 9999. Example: 13

discount   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 73

customer_id   string  optional    

Must match an existing stored value.

payment_method   string  optional    

This field is required when payments is not present. Example: card

Must be one of:
  • cash
  • card
  • transfer
  • wallet
  • credit
cash_received   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 45

payments   object[]  optional    

This field is required when payment_method is not present. Must have at least 1 items. Must not have more than 10 items.
method   string     

Example: cash

Must be one of:
  • cash
  • card
  • transfer
  • wallet
  • credit
  • voucher
amount   number     

Must be at least 0.01. Example: 56

reference   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: eopfuudtdsufvyvddqamn

notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: qeopfuudtdsufvyvddqam

redeem_loyalty_points   integer  optional    

Must be at least 1. Example: 46

warehouse_id   string  optional    

Must match an existing stored value.

branch_id   string  optional    

Must match an existing stored value.

offline_uuid   string  optional    

Must be a valid UUID. Example: 77d66ab0-ed8e-31b6-bb6b-acfbf3e0d8a0

ETA submission log: paginated list of invoices with their ETA status.

Used for the invoice submission log / immutable archive view.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost/api/invoices/eta-log" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"status\": \"cancelled\",
    \"start_date\": \"2026-06-29T21:35:32\",
    \"end_date\": \"2107-07-29\",
    \"per_page\": 13
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/invoices/eta-log"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "status": "cancelled",
    "start_date": "2026-06-29T21:35:32",
    "end_date": "2107-07-29",
    "per_page": 13
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,

Request      

GET api/invoices/eta-log

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

status   string  optional    

Example: cancelled

Must be one of:
  • pending
  • submitted
  • valid
  • invalid
  • cancelled
  • rejected
start_date   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-06-29T21:35:32

end_date   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Must be a date after or equal to start_date. Example: 2107-07-29

per_page   integer  optional    

Must be at least 10. Must not be greater than 100. Example: 13

Licensing

Activate a license key for a device. First activation binds the device; subsequent calls from the same device re-confirm it.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/license/activate" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"license_key\": \"consequatur\",
    \"device_id\": \"mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa\",
    \"device_name\": \"mniihfqcoynlazghdtqtq\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/license/activate"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "license_key": "consequatur",
    "device_id": "mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa",
    "device_name": "mniihfqcoynlazghdtqtq"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

POST api/license/activate

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

license_key   string     

Example: consequatur

device_id   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

device_name   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: mniihfqcoynlazghdtqtq

Periodic online re-validation (e.g. every 24h) from an already activated device.

}"

    "http://localhost/api/products"
);

};

    "per_page": 16,

};

Request      

GET api/products

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

search   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

category   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: amniihfqcoynlazghdtqt

low_stock   string  optional    

Example: false

Must be one of:
  • 0
  • 1
  • true
  • false
per_page   integer  optional    

Must be at least 10. Must not be greater than 200. Example: 16

all   string  optional    

Example: 1

Must be one of:
  • 0
  • 1
  • true
  • false

POST api/products

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/products" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq\",
    \"price\": 1,
    \"wholesale_price\": 13,
    \"vip_price\": 13,
    \"cost_price\": 8,
    \"min_stock\": 9,
    \"reorder_point\": 8,
    \"reorder_qty\": 6,
    \"barcode\": \"qcoynlazghdtqtqxbajwb\",
    \"category\": \"pilpmufinllwloauydlsm\",
    \"supplier\": \"sjuryvojcybzvrbyickzn\",
    \"unit_id\": 17,
    \"tax_category_id\": 17,
    \"track_batches\": false,
    \"initial_quantity\": 13,
    \"warehouse_id\": 17
}"

    "http://localhost/api/products"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq",
    "price": 1,
    "wholesale_price": 13,
    "vip_price": 13,
    "cost_price": 8,
    "min_stock": 9,
    "reorder_point": 8,
    "reorder_qty": 6,

    "category": "pilpmufinllwloauydlsm",
    "supplier": "sjuryvojcybzvrbyickzn",
    "unit_id": 17,
    "tax_category_id": 17,
    "track_batches": false,
    "initial_quantity": 13,
    "warehouse_id": 17
};

    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST api/products

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

price   number     

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 9999999. Example: 1

wholesale_price   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 9999999. Example: 13

vip_price   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 9999999. Example: 13

cost_price   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 9999999. Example: 8

min_stock   integer  optional    

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 999999. Example: 9

reorder_point   integer  optional    

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 999999. Example: 8

reorder_qty   integer  optional    

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 999999. Example: 6

barcode   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: qcoynlazghdtqtqxbajwb

category   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: pilpmufinllwloauydlsm

supplier   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: sjuryvojcybzvrbyickzn

unit_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

tax_category_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

track_batches   boolean  optional    

Example: false

initial_quantity   integer  optional    

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 999999. Example: 13

warehouse_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

PUT api/products/{id}

Example request:

    "http://localhost/api/products/1" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \

    \"price\": 1,
    \"wholesale_price\": 13,
    \"vip_price\": 13,
    \"cost_price\": 8,
    \"min_stock\": 9,
    \"quantity\": 8,
    \"reorder_point\": 6,
    \"reorder_qty\": 16,
    \"barcode\": \"coynlazghdtqtqxbajwbp\",
    \"category\": \"ilpmufinllwloauydlsms\",
    \"supplier\": \"juryvojcybzvrbyickznk\",
    \"unit_id\": 17,
    \"tax_category_id\": 17,
    \"track_batches\": true
}"

    "http://localhost/api/products/1"
);

    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

    "price": 1,

    "vip_price": 13,
    "cost_price": 8,
    "min_stock": 9,

};

}).then(response => response.json());

PUT api/products/{id}

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The ID of the product. Example: 1

Body Parameters

name   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: vmqeopfuudtdsufvyvddq

price   number     

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 9999999. Example: 1

wholesale_price   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 9999999. Example: 13

vip_price   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 9999999. Example: 13

cost_price   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 9999999. Example: 8

min_stock   integer  optional    

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 999999. Example: 9

quantity   integer  optional    

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 999999. Example: 8

reorder_point   integer  optional    

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 999999. Example: 6

reorder_qty   integer  optional    

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 999999. Example: 16

barcode   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: coynlazghdtqtqxbajwbp

category   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: ilpmufinllwloauydlsms

supplier   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: juryvojcybzvrbyickznk

unit_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

tax_category_id   integer  optional    

Must match an existing stored value. Example: 17

track_batches   boolean  optional    

Example: true

}"

);

    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

    "reason": "mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa",

Request      

POST api/products/{product_id}/add-stock

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

product_id   integer     

The ID of the product. Example: 1

Body Parameters

quantity   integer     

Must be at least 1. Must not be greater than 999999. Example: 21

reason   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: mqeopfuudtdsufvyvddqa

reference_type   string  optional    

Example: purchase

Must be one of:
  • purchase
  • adjustment
  • return
  • initial
warehouse_id   string  optional    

Must match an existing stored value.
